allow: PowerShell($p = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle\\gradle.properties"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { "EXISTS:"; Get-Content $p } else { "NO GLOBAL gradle.properties" }; "---WININET PROXY---"; Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings' | Select-Object ProxyEnable, ProxyServer)

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\MOHE\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; for \($i=0; $i -lt 12; $i++\) { $b = \(& $adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>$null\).Trim\(\); if \($b -eq "1"\) { "BOOTED - ready to go!"; break }; "still booting... \($i\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 })
